title: Learning from Home: The Story of Maria and Tom
passage:
Learning from Home

Online learning is very popular today. Many students do not go to a traditional school building. Instead, they study at home using a computer and the internet. This is also called distance education.

Maria is a fifteen-year-old student from Spain. She studies online every day. Her online school starts at 9:00 AM. First, she logs into her computer and checks her emails. Then, she joins a live video class with her teacher and classmates. Today, her teacher, Mr. Smith, is teaching a history lesson. Maria can see her teacher on the screen and hear his voice. She can also type questions in the chat box. The live class finishes at 10:30 AM.

After the live class, Maria has a short break. She drinks some water and eats an apple. At 11:00 AM, she starts her independent work. She reads a science article on her computer and answers ten questions. She also watches a short video about space. Online learning gives Maria a lot of free time. She can choose when to do her homework. She likes this because she can practice the piano in the afternoon.

However, online learning is not always easy. Sometimes, Maria feels lonely because she cannot play with her friends during breaks. Also, her internet connection is sometimes slow, and the video stops. Her mother, Elena, helps her when there are computer problems. Maria misses her school friends, but she enjoys online learning because she can sleep longer in the morning. She plans to study online next year too.

Another student, Tom, lives in Canada. He is twelve years old. Tom also does distance education because his home is far from the city. Tom has online classes only three days a week: Monday, Wednesday, and Friday. On Tuesdays and Thursdays, he does projects at home. Tom loves science and uses his computer to do virtual experiments. His father, David, helps him with his science projects. Tom thinks online learning is great because he does not have to travel on a school bus every day.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What time does Maria's online school start?
questions.explanation: The text states: 'Her online school starts at 9:00 AM.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What lesson does Mr. Smith teach today?
questions.explanation: The text states: 'Today, her teacher, Mr. Smith, is teaching a history lesson.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why does Tom like online learning?

options.B: He does not have to travel on a school bus.

questions.explanation: The text states: 'Tom thinks online learning is great because he does not have to travel on a school bus every day.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Maria eats an apple during her break.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'She drinks some water and eats an apple.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Maria's father helps her when she has computer problems.
questions.explanation: The text says: 'Her mother, Elena, helps her when there are computer problems.', not her father.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Tom has online classes every day of the week.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'Tom has online classes only three days a week: Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Tom wants to become a doctor in the future.
questions.explanation: The text mentions that Tom loves science and does virtual experiments, but there is no information about his future job.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Maria uses a chat box to type her ______ to the teacher.
questions.explanation: The text says: 'She can also type questions in the chat box.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: In the afternoon, Maria can practice the ______ .
questions.explanation: The text says: 'she can practice the piano in the afternoon.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Tom does not live close to the ______ .
questions.explanation: The text says: 'Tom also does distance education because his home is far from the city.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Tom uses his computer to do virtual ______ .
questions.explanation: The text says: 'uses his computer to do virtual experiments.'

vocabulary.meaning: a system of education where students study at home using the internet
working or doing things alone without help from others
sad because you are not with other people
made or done on a computer, not in the real world
a scientific test to learn or find out something

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài (Tactics)

1. Dành cho dạng bài Multiple Choice: Tìm từ khóa về thời gian hoặc tên riêng (ví dụ: '9:00 AM', 'Mr. Smith') trong bài đọc để tìm ra câu trả lời nhanh chóng.

2. Dành cho dạng bài True/False/Not Given: Đối chiếu trực tiếp từ vựng trong câu hỏi với bài đọc. Vì đây là trình độ A1-A2, các từ vựng sẽ giống hệt nhau hoặc chỉ thay đổi rất ít. Nếu thông tin hoàn toàn trái ngược (ví dụ: 'mother' thay vì 'father'), chọn FALSE. Nếu thông tin không được nhắc đến, chọn NOT GIVEN.

3. Dành cho dạng bài Sentence Completion: Đọc kỹ giới hạn từ (NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS). Tìm các từ xung quanh khoảng trống trong bài đọc để xác định từ chính xác cần điền (như 'practice the...', 'virtual...'). Viết đúng chính tả của từ xuất hiện trong văn bản.
